welcome_message:
Welcome, {name}!
I am the subscription management bot.
balance_info:
👤 Your profile:

ID: {id}
Balance: {balance} Ⓜ️

Invite friends and get 5% of their payments in Ⓜ️!
notify_24h: ⚠️ Your subscription expires in 24 hours. Please renew to keep your access.
notify_3d: ℹ️ Reminder: your subscription expires in 3 days.
grace_period_start: ⚠️ Your subscription has expired. You have a 24-hour Grace Period to pay before access is restricted.
access_revoked: ❌ Your subscription to {title} and the grace period have expired. Access is now restricted.
renew_success: ✅ Your subscription {title} has been successfully renewed!
renew_failed: ❌ Failed to automatically renew your subscription. Please check your card balance or pay manually in the app. You have a Grace Period (24h).
